notes: Students on graduate assistantships receive resident tuition, a tuition scholarship and fee awards, and free health insurance.
Students on a graduate assistantship for the Summer term will usually register for 1 credit of research (HCI 6990).

considerations: Cost of attendance is an estimate for one year.
Estimated expenses for one academic year listed on I-20 (F-1); full program on DS-2019 (J-1).
Tuition/fees/housing charges set by Iowa Board of Regents.
Estimated living expenses include room & board, books & supplies, personal expenses, and health insurance.
ISU Student & Scholar Medical Insurance Plan purchase is required for all international students (1+ credit hour); cost included in Living Expenses.
Living Expenses do NOT include international travel costs.
